item.title: [LU-703] liblustre timeout
item.description:
v2_1_0_0-RC2 testing

Report: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/4fb0d978-e419-11e0-9909-52540025f9af

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: AS I understand it we have now disabled liblustre tests

Lustre Tag: v2_1_1_0_RC1
Distro/Arch: RHEL5.7 (server), SLES11SP1 (client)
Lustre Build: http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_1/37/
Network: TCP

The same issue occurred:
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/5cd8c8b2-5300-11e1-81a2-5254004bbbd3

note that accept=all is required to be present in lnet options on the servers or liblustre is not going to be operational.

So if this setting is missing during testing, it's a test environment bug.

Yujian, I think default listening port on server side is 988, could it be the reason that liblustre client can't connect to server?

In manual test runs, I did not hit the connection issue after only adding the following line into the modprobe config files on both clients and servers:

options lnet networks=tcp accept=all

The issue in this ticket only occurred in autotest runs.
Yujian, I think default listening port on server side is 988, could it be the reason that liblustre client can't connect to server?

Bobi

Could you please look into this one?

Thanks

Peter
This has been occurring quite often recently so setting as a blocker for 2.2

Hi Chris,
The following variables in autotest_config.sh are suspicious:

# some bits for liblustre tcp connecttions
export LNET_ACCEPT_PORT=7988
export ACCEPTOR_PORT=7988

While I running liblustre test on Toro cluster, I did not specify any variables, and only added the following line into the modprobe config file:

options lnet networks=tcp accept=all

Lustre Tag: v2_1_0_0_RC2
Lustre Build: http://newbuild.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/283/
Distro/Arch: RHEL6/x86_64(server), RHEL6/i686(client)
Network: TCP

Manually running liblustre test hit LU-644:
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/72672ea2-e5ec-11e0-9909-52540025f9af
